calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-22-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Adam Gurley, Respondent/Plaintiff; Michael Nien Appellant/Respondent.

This case comes on regularly for Trial de Novo. All parties are affirmed.

Michael Nien testifies on his own behalf. The following exhibit is introduced:
Exhibit 1 - Legal Services Retainer Agreement and emails

Adam Gurley testifies on his own behalf.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. Judge Pro Tem: Michelle Brant, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-16-2019 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-21-2018 Continued To Jan-07-19 At 06:30 P.M. In Dept 506
